name: Combat — Drums of the Valley
description: The same Cherry Valley theme at battle intensity: driving war drums and taiko join, a low brass ostinato runs under the melody, strings turn to urgent tremolo. Crossfade in when combat starts — the melody stays recognizably the same, so the world never 'changes song'.
style_delta: driving war drums and taiko hits keeping the same tempo
low brass ostinato under the same main melody
forceful battle energy, same key and structure

alignment.note: Same sections/tempo/key as the base by construction, but generated independently — NOT phase-locked and NOT a summable stem. Vertical remix: crossfade full mixes on a downbeat of the DESTINATION mix (its timing.downbeats_s) over ~250-500 ms.
